heading: Fugitives from justice
label: 404c–2 Fugitives from justice
text: All fugitives from justice taking refuge in the park shall be subject to the same laws as fugitives from justice found in the Commonwealth of Kentucky.
notes: Amendments1948—Act , struck out first sentence relating to inclusion of park in a judicial district. See , Judiciary and Judicial Procedure, and , Crimes and Criminal Procedure.June 25, 1948section 97 of Title 28section 3231 of Title 18
Effective Date of 1948 AmendmentSection 38 of act , provided that the amendment made by that act is effective .June 25, 1948Sept. 1, 1948
